response.overview: Recorded live at Pinkpop Festival 2026 in Landgraaf, the Netherlands, Zara Larsson brings the radiant energy of her Midnight Sun era to one of Europe’s most iconic festival stages. Backed by dazzling visuals, powerful vocals, and a dynamic live production, Larsson leads the crowd through a set that celebrates her artistic reinvention. Standout performances of “Midnight Sun,” “Blue Moon,” “Pretty Ugly,” and “Stateside” showcase the heart of her latest chapter, blending euphoric pop, fearless self-expression, and emotional storytelling. Alongside beloved hits such as “Lush Life,” “Never Forget You,” and “Symphony,” this electrifying performance captures Zara Larsson at her most confident, ambitious, and unforgettable.
response.tagline: The sound of summer, live from Pinkpop.
response.title: Zara Larsson: Pinkpop Festival 2026
